name: TokenAsset
description: Independent, source-backed diligence and monitoring of tokenized real-world assets. Every claim is labeled by evidence type and tied to a dated source. No scores, ratings, or recommendations. Not investment, legal, or tax advice.

dataset.name: BUIDL diligence teardown
dataset.description: Source-labeled diligence teardown of the BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL). Private-feedback; public-safe sections use only public sources.

dataset.name: WTGXX diligence teardown
dataset.description: Source-labeled diligence teardown of the WisdomTree Treasury Money Market Digital Fund (WTGXX). Public-safe.

dataset.name: BENJI / FOBXX diligence teardown
dataset.description: Source-labeled diligence teardown of the Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund (FOBXX / BENJI). Public-safe.

dataset.name: EUTBL / Spiko diligence teardown
dataset.description: Source-labeled diligence teardown of the Spiko EU T-Bills Money Market Fund (EUTBL). Public-safe.

disclaimer: Independent diligence research. Not investment advice, legal advice, or tax advice. No scores, ratings, grades, rankings, or buy/sell/hold recommendations. Every claim carries a source/status label. Missing facts are marked: Unverified - additional primary source required.
